attempts.strategy: Planner-recommended mate-calculus route: reduce to pullback-side via conjugateEquiv_comp + injectivity of conjugateEquiv, then pseudofunctor_associativity
attempts.code_tried: route via conjugateEquiv injectivity to pullback-side pentagon
attempts.lean_error: (deterministic) timeout at `whnf`, maximum number of heartbeats (200000) reached
attempts.goal_before: pushPullMap F (h ≫ g) = pushPullMap F g ≫ pushPullMap F h
attempts.insight: The conjugateEquiv_comp route recommended in the blueprint/analogies file is itself INFEASIBLE — it triggers the same kernel whnf blow-up the planner attributed only to the pushforward erw grind. The decl + dependency chain were already written by a prior iter but red.

attempts.strategy: Bypass conjugateEquiv entirely: reduce pushPullMap to rawPushPullMap via the rfl-lemma pushPullMap_eq_raw, then apply rawPushPullMap_comp which substs the two over-triangle equalities (trivialising eqToHom transports) and uses pushPull_unit_comp + pushPull_pentagon
attempts.goal_before: pushPullMap F (h ≫ g) = pushPullMap F g ≫ pushPullMap F h
attempts.insight: The real blocker was a `rewrite` failure in the supporting lemma pushPull_pentagon (line ~545): h1/h2 stated objects in composed-functor form (F⋙G).obj while the goal carried them applied G.obj(F.obj _) — defeq but not syntactic, so reassoc_of% would not fire. Fixed by `simp only [Functor.comp_obj] at h1 h2 ⊢` to align object forms first, THEN reassoc_of%. Fixing that one error compiled pushPullMap_comp and its whole cone.

next_steps: Update the lem:push_pull_comp blueprint proof sketch (currently describes the infeasible conjugateEquiv route). Blueprint pushPullFunctor + push-pull helpers. File-split push-pull stack out of CechHigherDirectImage.lean for parallel P3/P4 lanes.

attempts.strategy: Stretch objective (P2): once pushPullFunctor is a functor, construct CechNerve by lifting the backbone to Over X, augmenting via the terminal Over.mk(𝟙 X), flipping to cosimplicial via rightOp, and whiskering through pushPullFunctor
attempts.lean_error: (transient) initially used .leftOp — wrong direction; Functor.leftOp un-ops the codomain
attempts.insight: Augmentation coherence `w` is automatic by terminal uniqueness (Over.mkIdTerminal.hom_ext) — no manual diagram chase. To turn SimplexCategoryᵒᵖ ⥤ Over X into SimplexCategory ⥤ (Over X)ᵒᵖ use .rightOp (not .leftOp), and a type ascription is needed because SimplicialObject (Over X) does not reducibly expose its ᵒᵖ shape. CechNerve had to be relocated from line 83 to just before relativeCechComplexOfNerve since it now depends on coverCechNerve/pushPullFunctor defined later (forward-pointer comment left at old site; \lean{} pin unchanged).

next_steps: Blueprint the new realisation helpers coverCechNerveOver, coverCechNerveOverAug, cechNerveCosimplicial, pushPullFunctor (1-to-1 coverage debt).

findings.blocker: Needs from-scratch module-level localisation + contracting-homotopy infra (absent from Mathlib for Scheme.Modules); P3. Objective explicitly said do NOT touch.

next_steps: Decompose with effort-breaker before any P3 prover dispatch; build localisation infra. Not to be re-assigned without a structural change.
